wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}
{{Power Infobox|Vulnerable|2}}{{KW|Vulnerable||2}} is a {{2|Debuffs|Debuff}} both players and enemies can apply to their targets. While available to all characters, the {{KW|Ironclad||2}} has the most dedicated support for {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.

While a character or enemy has {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}, the damage received from {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack cards|2}} and enemy Attacks is increased by 50% (typically), then rounded down.

At the end of its turn, one point of {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} is decremented from the player or enemy.

== Sources ==
=== On Player ===
==== Overgrowth ====
*{{M|Flyconid||2}} {{Int|Flyconid|Weakening Spores||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Mawler||2}} {{Int|Mawler|Roar||2}}: 3 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
==== Underdocks ====
*{{M|Haunted Ship||2}} {{Int|Haunted Ship|Haunt||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Terror Eel||2}} {{Int|Terror Eel|Terror||2}}: 99 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Soul Fysh||2}} {{Int|Soul Fysh|Scream||2}}: 3 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
==== Hive ====
*{{M|Ovicopter||2}} {{Int|Ovicopter|Tenderizer||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
==== Glory ====
*{{M|Owl Magistrate||2}} {{Int|Owl Magistrate|Verdict||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Soul Nexus||2}} {{Int|Soul Nexus|Drain Life||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Test Subject||2}} {{Int|Test Subject|Skull Bash||2}}: 1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
*{{M|Queen||2}} {{Int|Queen|You're Mine||2}}: 99 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
----
=== On Enemies ===

* {{C|Molten Fist||2}}: Double the enemy's {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Thunderclap||2}}: 1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Tremble||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Dominate||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Taunt||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Uppercut||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Break||2}}: 5(7) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.


* {{C|Expose||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Assassinate||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.


* {{C|Falling Star||2}}: 1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Know Thy Place||2}}: 1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Gamma Blast||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Comet||2}}: 3 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|Meteor Shower||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} to ALL enemies.


* {{C|Fear||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{C|High Five||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} to ALL enemies.
* {{C|Putrefy||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.

==== Relics ====
* {{R|Bag of Marbles||2}}: Enemies start with 1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{R|Hand Drill||2}}: 2 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} when {{KW|Block||2}} is broken.

==== Potions ====
* {{P|Vulnerable Potion||2}}: 3 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* {{P|Potion of Binding||2}}:  1 {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} to ALL enemies.

== Interactions ==
===Synergies===
* {{C|Bully||2}}: Deals 2(3) additional damage for each {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} on the enemy.
* {{C|Dismantle||2}}: If the enemy is {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}, hits twice.
* {{C|Dominate||2}}: Gain 1 {{KW|Strength||2}} for each {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} on the enemy.
* {{C|Vicious||2}}: Whenever you apply {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}, draw 1(2) card.
* {{C|Colossus||2}}: You receive 50% less damage from {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} enemies this turn.
* {{C|Cruelty||2}}: {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} enemies take an additional 25%(50%) damage.
* {{R|Paper Phrog||2}}: Enemies with {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} take 75% more damage rather than 50%.
** {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} stacks ''additively'' with {{C|Cruelty||2}}.
** {{R|Paper Phrog||2}}'s effect is worded differently from (unupgraded) {{C|Cruelty||2}}'s, but they are effectively identical.
* {{C|Debilitate||2}}: {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} is twice as effective against the enemy for the next 3(4) turns.
**Because {{C|Debilitate||2}} ''doubles'' {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}'s damage multiplier, if it is in play alongside {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} or (unupgraded) {{C|Cruelty||2}}, they will combine for enemies with {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} to take an additional ''+150%'' total damage.
**Because {{C|Debilitate||2}} is a ''[[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]]'', it compounds with {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} for ''all'' players during [[Slay the Spire 2:Multiplayer|Multiplayer]]. Whereas {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} and {{C|Cruelty||2}} benefit solely the player who controls them.
* ''[[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]]'' Synergies
** {{C|Sleight of Flesh||2}}: Inflicts 9(13) damage to an enemy whenever they receive a debuff.
** {{C|Misery||2}}: Applies any debuffs on its target to ALL other enemies.
** {{C|Rend||2}}: Deals 5(8) additional damage for each unique debuff on an enemy.
** {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} doubles the first application of a [[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]] via a played card during combat.

=== Order ===
* Additive effects such as {{KW|Strength||2}} are applied '''before''' multiplicative effects like {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
** For example, if you have 2 {{KW|Strength||2}} and play {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike|2}} on a {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} target, you will deal '''12''' damage ((6+2)×1.5) instead of '''11''' damage ((6×1.5)+2).
** Additive effects include {{KW|Strength||2}}, {{KW|Vigor||2}}, {{C|Accuracy||2}}, {{R|Strike Dummy||2}} and {{KW|Enchant|Enchantments|2}} such as {{KW|Sharp||2}}, {{KW|Vigorous||2}}, and {{KW|Momentum||2}}.
** Multiplicative effects are {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}, {{KW|Weak||2}}, {{BD|Double Damage||2}}, {{R|Pen Nib||2}}, {{BD|Flutter||2}}, {{BD|Shrink||2}}, {{BD|Soar||2}}, {{BD|Slow||2}}, and {{BD|Surrounded||2}}.
* Due to rounding, {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} deals 1 less damage for attacks with a base damage value ''not'' divisible by 2 (IE odd numbers).
** This damage reduction is magnified by multi-hit attacks.
** If {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} or unupgraded {{C|Cruelty||2}} is in possession, then attacks' divisibility by '''4''' is the deciding factor, rather than 2.

=== Effects Immune to Vulnerable ===

* Damaging [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relics]] and [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Orbs|Orbs]] do not interact with {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* Both {{KW|Poison||2}} and {{KW|Doom||2}} are not affected by {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* Only cards with the "{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}"-type can benefit from {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
** For example, {{C|Inferno||2}}, {{C|Serpent Form||2}}, {{C|Capture Spirit||2}}, and {{C|The Bomb||2}} are '''not''' affected by {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
* Direct removal of [[Health|HP]] does not count as damage, and thus is not affected by {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
** The secondary effects of the {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} {{C|Hemokinesis||2}} and {{C|Strangle||2}} are not affected by {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}.
